title: Audit commit 1c8023c7 in /tmp/phase0-1c8023 against the 7-item Phase 0 handoff test plan from ~/.claude/cache/dev-spec-phase0-handoff-pipeline.md section 6. Identify missing automated coverage and propose the smallest robust tests to add, with target files and assertions. Do not edit files.
summary_text: **Audit Result (commit `1c8023c7`)** `1c8023c7` implements the handoff logic in code, but adds **no automated tests** for it. Changed logic is in [fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:289](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:289), [fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:327](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:327), [fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:426](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:426), [delegate.js:212](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js:212), [delegate.js:385](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js:385). Current tests in [test-integration-bridge-spawn.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-integration-bridge-spawn.mjs:1) and [test-delegate-mcp-config.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-delegate-mcp-config.mjs:1) do not cover the Phase 0 handoff criteria. **Missing Automated Coverage (7-item handoff plan)** 1. Bridge injects `--auto-context` + `--delegation-context-file` for codex lanes: **Missing**. 2. Per-lane context file generation and `<=2048` bytes: **Missing**. 3. Concurrent matrix lane race safety: **Missing**. 4. Stale context rejection on `run_id` mismatch: **Missing**. 5. `task` redaction before writing context: **Missing**. 6. Backward compatibility fallback when flag omitted: **Missing**. 7. `glm/gemini` unaffected (no codex-only flags): **Missing**. **Smallest Robust Tests To Add** 1. Extend [test-integration-bridge-spawn.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-integration-bridge-spawn.mjs:1) with 5 tests: - `codex lane injects handoff flags`: assert lane output `args` include `--auto-context` and `--delegation-context-file <path>`. - `context file path+size`: assert file exists under `~/.claude/cache/delegation-context/`, name pattern `{runId}--{agent}.md`, and `Buffer.byteLength(...) <= 2048`. - `matrix concurrency isolation`: run 3 codex/codex-spark lanes in one matrix, assert 3 distinct context files, no collisions. - `task secret redaction`: task includes secret token; assert context file does not contain raw secret and contains redaction marker. - `glm/gemini no codex flags`: for `glm` and `gemini` lanes, assert `args` do **not** include `--auto-context` or `--delegation-context-file`. 2. Extend [test-delegate-mcp-config.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-delegate-mcp-config.mjs:1) with 2 tests: - `stale run_id is skipped`: pass `--auto-context --run-id X --delegation-context-file <file with run_id Y>`, capture prompt passed to fake `codex`, assert stale marker absent. - `default fallback works`: create `~/.claude/cache/delegation-context.md`, run with `--auto-context` and no explicit file, assert marker from default file is included in prompt. **Risk Note** Redaction for the exact Stripe-style example (`STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_live_...`) is likely not guaranteed by current patterns in [output-filter.js:8](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/output-filter.js:8). Add a test that encodes the expected behavior so this cannot regress silently. Kernel orchestration note: this audit was executed as a single lane (no cross-lane corroboration).
